Enumeration Case# kSBCModePageFlexibleDisk_TRDY_Mask

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.3+

```
kSBCModePageFlexibleDisk_TRDY_Mask = (1 << kSBCModePageFlexibleDisk_TRDY_Bit)
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/1555525-trdy_ssn_mo_bitfields/ksbcmodepageflexibledisk_trdy_mask#discussion)
